name: Bookworm
short_description: Travel across Wonderland in this zen little typing game.
detailed_description:
Bookworm is a typing game where the goal is to score points by completing as many words as possible. The twist is that you can type in any direction you want - even up or down.

You are the Bookworm with an appetite for the finest words in the fairytale. Crawl from letter to letter in search for quest words to stay golden. While golden, your multiplier increases by covering words. Relax, take your time, but avoid dead ends and climb the leaderboard.

Each run begins somewhere in the 12 chapters of Lewis Carrolls' Alice’s Adventures in Wonderland
